properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 125/20
 COMMENCING FROM 01 JAN 2021 NAVAREA XIX WILL BE IN FULL OPERATIONAL CAPABILITY FOR IRIDIUM SAFETYCAST NAVIGATIONAL WARNINGS. THE NORWEGIAN COASTAL ADMINISTRATION, AS THE NAVAREA XIX COORDINATOR, WILL PROMULGATE SAFETYCAST MESSAGES AS PART OF A NUMBERED SERIES IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE JOINT IMO/IHO/WMO MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION MANUAL.
 SEE NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS (EFS) 1/21 FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.
 CONTACT INFORMATION FOR NAVAREA XIX; PHONE: +47 78 98 98 98, FAX: +47 78 98 98 99, EMAIL: NAVAREA19@KYSTVERKET.NO
